results.title: Size
results.reviewText: Very disappointed there were no reviews on the shorts so I just went with what size the model was wearing. Extremely misleading and now I’m stuck with nonreturnable item.

luluResponse.responseText:
Hi Peter, 

Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts on the Pace Breaker Short 7" *Linerless. We hear where you're coming from and I'm sorry to hear your item hasn't held up for you as expected. We're eager to work out a resolution, so I'm sending you an email to chat more. Chat soon!

results.title: Short shorts
results.reviewText: These shorts have a nice feel to them but are exceptionally short.

results.title: Incorrect sewing on one side
results.reviewText: I love the design and fabric. However, one of the pockets seems to be sewn incorrectly and creates a crease across the shorts because of the imperfection... disappointed in that.

luluResponse.responseText:
Hi Simon Hurley,

results.title: What's happening?
results.reviewText: Shorts are already starting to fray, had to use a lighter to save the strings from pulling all the way out. Not really the quality I've encountered from lulu

results.title: Too small
results.reviewText: I bought these for my boyfriend for Valentine’s Day. He had the same pair that he has had and loved. I bought the same size and they do not fit at all and sadly can’t return them. They must have changed the style of them since the last time we bought a pair last summer.

luluResponse.responseText:
Dear Clarey,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. I’m sorry to read of your recent experience and would love to hear more about what is going on with your Pace Breaker Short 7". Hang tight for an email coming your way! Chat soon.

results.title: Powerlifter
results.reviewText: I felt mislead by the color “Sequoia”. The color shorts I received looked VERY different from the one that I had ordered. It’s sad because the product itself is excellent and I would love to wear these shorts.... but I detest the color! Wish I could trade them out for a different shade, more like the one I thought I had ordered.

results.title: Odd fit
results.reviewText: These shorts fit my waist well, but are restrictive in the glute and thigh regions. They look roomier in the product pictures. Wish these weren't "final sale"

luluResponse.responseText:
Dear Brandleton,

Thanks for taking the time to write a review! We've passed along the feedback to our Design Team. We pride ourselves on creating long lasting garments that have great fit and function. Your feedback is greatly valued!

results.title: Hole
results.reviewText: Excellent shorts great look, great feel, will probably buy again, except for getting a hole in them in the first 24 hours of getting them.

luluResponse.responseText:
Hey GolfBoy,

Thanks for reaching out and providing this feedback for us. I'm sorry to hear you're experiencing a hole with your Pace Breaker Short Linerless 7". We'd love to learn more and make things right for you, so keep an eye out for an email coming your way.

results.title: Pace Breaker Short *Linerless 7”
results.reviewText: I am so disappointed because online the picture show the logo shows very clear. However, when I got them in person, the logo doesn’t stand out. It was very misleading and I am so upset.

luluResponse.responseText:
Dear Tisung,

Thank you for taking the time to review the Pace Breaker Short *Linerless 7". We want you to know, feedback is at the heart of everything we do and we'd love to make this experience right for you.To carry on this conversation, we've sent you a follow up email. Chat soon!

results.title: Decent
results.reviewText: bought these and bearbottom shorts at the same time. bearbottoms were way better especially at 5.5" inseam. The material of these seem solid and durable, so it's better than other active wear shorts that i've bought.

results.title: Pockets Stick Out
results.reviewText: I started getting Pace Breaker shorts instead of T.H.E. Short because the new design of T.H.E. Short always has the pockets sticking out/billowed out when worn. For some reason the watermelon red color of pace breakers does this too sadly. I recently got Pace Breakers in the Kaleidoscope colorway and the pockets don't billow as much. The Kaleidoscope pair also feels softer and silkier. I don't know why this is. Maybe materials change between color choices but that doesn't explain why the pockets billow more on the watermelon red color. It sucks because I like these a lot otherwise.

results.title: Baggy Shorts. Comfortable Fabric
results.reviewText: I will say that these are very comfortable and stretchy shorts. But there is no taper in the leg whatsoever so if you are skinny like I am they look very ill-fitted and loose around the leg openings. I would describe it as a lazily styled product. I would wear these for activities like running / sports where you need full range of motion in the legs, but I originally bought these to be gym shorts and don't think I will wear them because of how baggy they look.

results.title: Avg shorts
results.reviewText: Love the lite ness of the shorts but dislike the new design of the pockets, old pacebreaker short pockets where more vertical off tot he side, the cut of the these makes the shorts look funny and you lose stuff out of your pocket more easily

luluResponse.responseText:
Dear Drgym, 

Thanks for taking the time to write a review! We've passed along the feedback to our Design Team. We pride ourselves on creating long lasting garments that have great fit and function. Your feedback is greatly valued!

results.title: Where's the logo
results.reviewText: I read reviews and everyone said they run big so I got large, they fit more like a medium and are way too small. I have owned a couple of things from Lulu-lemon and had no issues but these shorts did not even have a logo on them, disappointed.

luluResponse.responseText:

I hear that this is not the case and would like to work with you to create a resolution. Please keep an eye on your inbox as I'll be reaching out shortly to connect.

results.title: Everything good except the pocket
results.reviewText: Really good just wish it had the same side pocket as T.H.E. shorts because the zipper pocket on these does not have enough room for my phone.
